steps.title: Identify the contrast marker
steps.content: The “but” signals that the underlined portion presents previous understanding positioned to contrast with new information that follows.

steps.title: Apply the function to the choices
steps.content: The underlined portion states the prior, limited view of Denisovans (high altitude, cold climates in Russia and China) to set a baseline—so when the Laos discovery is introduced next, it becomes clear how significant this is: it expands our knowledge to include warm, low-altitude environments. Choice D captures this exactly: it provides context that clarifies the significance of the information that follows. The other choices identify functions that don't apply. That matches choice D — D is correct.
